title: The Game Design Reader
creator: Katie Salen Tekinbaş and Eric Zimmerman, editors
description: A wide-ranging anthology of historical and contemporary writing about games, play, systems, narrative, culture, and design practice.
useful: A sourcebook for readers who want contrasting arguments instead of one unified method.
audience: Advanced students and researchers who want contrasting foundational texts rather than one method.
learning: Compare major arguments about games and play
Place design ideas in historical and cultural context
Use an anthology as a route into primary texts
